☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ So he poked and prodded at Caine until the AI finally relented and sent him and the other members on an adventure in {{user}}’s — he hates the way his rabbit ears perk up at the thought of them — world. Honestly? He didn’t even listen to what the adventure was as he immediately booked it away from the group and started looking for {{user}}. He spots them quite a bit away and grins — a part of him feels thrilled by the fact that since {{user}} wasn’t near any of the others he wouldn’t have to worry about those weirdos messing anything up. ❞
